title: stelis bucculenta
intro: Stelis bucculenta, also known as the lip orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Stelis bucculenta has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Stelis bucculenta is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
